name: 6q24_TPRG1_PARK2_SD
description: 6q24.2-q26 region containing PARK2/PRKN (parkin, the largest human gene by genomic span at ~1.4 Mb), TPRG1, and short flanking SDs. PARK2 introns are CNV hotspots (recurrent exonic deletions causing autosomal-recessive juvenile Parkinson disease). Common CNVs within PARK2 introns; SDs flank a 6q24 transient neonatal diabetes (TNDM) imprinting region (PLAGL1/HYMAI).

architecture.internal_structure: Multiple short SDs (~5-50 kb) within and around PARK2 introns at 90-97% identity; recurrent intragenic exonic CNVs; 6q24 TNDM imprinting domain at ~144 Mb (PLAGL1/HYMAI/ZAC1); LINE-1 rich intervening sequence.

related_diseases: transient neonatal diabetes mellitus type 1 (6q24 TNDM)
